series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Estimated Income Tax Payment for Estates and Trusts
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used to remit estimated tax payments for fiduciaries of estates and trusts that reside in and/or earn income in Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 6 months after scanning on ODT Info Image System ; Electronic: Retain in ODT Info Image System for 10 years, then erase., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
